title: Amakage
titleNative: 雨影
synopsis: Small creatures live in our world, their perspective of rain makes it seem as if the droplets are the size of cars. Follow along as one takes a bus ride.

title: Kero Kero Keroppi no Daibouken: Pink no Kinoko
titleRomaji: Kero Kero Keroppi no Daibouken: Pink no Kinoko
titleNative: けろけろけろっぴの大冒険~ピンクのきのこ
synopsis: In search of a pink mushroom to heal a brother's sickness.

tags.name: Kids

tags.name: Animals

tags.name: Anthropomorphism
tags.description: Contains non-human character(s) that have attributes or characteristics of a human being.

title: Ganbare!! Tabuchi-kun!!
titleNative: がんばれ!! タブチくん!!
synopsis: The Seibu Lions baseball team makes it to the next round of a baseball tournament thanks to the heroic efforts of its star player, Tabuchi, but the next stage will involve hard work and cooperation.

tags.name: Baseball
tags.description: Centers around the sport of baseball.

title: Duel Masters Movie 3: Honoo no Kizuna XX
titleRomaji: Duel Masters Movie 3: Honoo no Kizuna XX
titleNative: 劇場版デュエル・マスターズ 炎のキズナXX!!
synonyms: Gekijouban Duel Masters: Honoo no Kizuna XX
Duel Masters: Honou no Kizuna Double X
synopsis: The anime film Duel Masters: Honou no Kizuna XX is the third movie in the franchise. New movie based on Card Game Wizards Of The Coast.

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

title: Super Express Hikarian
titleNative: 超特急ヒカリアン
synopsis: Chou Tokkyuu Hikarian is about a series of bullet trains that are turned into robots. The robots, along with two humans named Tetsuyuki Shinbashi and Minayo Kanda, have to stop an alien invasion. (Source: Wikipedia)

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

tags.name: Trains
tags.description: Prominently features trains.

title: PLAYGROUND
titleNative: PLAYGROUND
synopsis: Creatures transform their own shapes innocently just as in a child's play. Tearing apart and uniting, this play continues endlessly. (Source: Official YouTube)

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

title: Minion
titleNative: Minion
synopsis: Minion by Rabbit MACHINE and Tsubura is an aesthetic loop animation with music.

title: Midnight Horror School
titleNative: ミッドナイトホラースクール
synopsis: The school has 26 students with each name of them beginning with a letter of the alphabet in order and a color, 3 teachers, 3 classrooms, a library, a cafeteria, a music room, a playroom, a fountain, a skeleton playground, a graveyard and several school staff. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Hyakka Zukan
titleNative: ひゃっかずかん
synopsis: A short film by Koji Yamamura. Both in English and Japanese, words develop in parallel from "A" to "Z"(from "A" to "Nn" in Japanese syllabary) taking the last syllable of the previous word. Ant-Take off-F..., Ari-Ririku-Ku... Along with the developments of those words, images metamorphoses using various animation technique so to be a pictorial encyclopedia of animation technique. (Source: yamamura animation)

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

tags.name: Educational
tags.description: Primary aim is to educate the audience.

title: Starlight Scramble
titleNative: スターライトスクランブル 恋愛候補生
synopsis: In the near future, during the colony war, a girl was save by a little boy when a space station was attacked by terrorists in which the girl lost her parents. A few years later, the girl joined her grandfather's military school. There she met a young man that looked similar to the boy who saved her... but just when she was prepared to enter the school compound, she sees a 'terrorist' lurking around which is actually a terrorist demo under the school command and so the story begins... (Source: AniDB)

title: Kinniku Banzuke: Kongou-kun no Daibouken!
titleNative: 筋肉番付 金剛くんの大冒険!
synopsis: A group of school children are invited to compete in the strongest man competition. As the first match is starting, the bored organizer announces that all matches will now be to the death. None of the competitors have a problem with the change. Who will survive and be crowned the strongest? (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Death Game
tags.description: Features characters participating in a game, where failure results in death.

tags.name: Primarily Child Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters below a high school age.

tags.name: Athletics
tags.description: Centers around sporting events that involve competitive running, jumping, throwing, or walking.

tags.name: Revenge
tags.description: Prominently features a character who aims to exact punishment in a resentful or vindictive manner.

title: Kitte no Gensou
titleNative: 切手の幻想
synopsis: Short experimental animation from 1961 from animation pioneer Yoji Kuri.

title: Shoujouji no Tanuki-bayashi Ban Danemon
titleNative: 證城寺の狸囃子 塙団右衛門
synopsis: The hero Danemon does battle with monsters and beasts in this short film from 1935. This is the extended original version of the film which was released as a talkie. The other version contains only pieces of the original and is narrated while this version has the original audio.

tags.name: Youkai
tags.description: Prominently features supernatural creatures from Japanese folklore.

title: Highway Jenny
titleNative: Highway Jenny
synopsis: Various places in the world, trouble is awakening the terror inside every person's view of life, the distant future of overhead airspace is shown in "Highway Jenny." It compares existance with one's lifetime and afterlife, it contemplates the purity and death of future generations, and to the person who looks at the importance of the choices in their own life, it will be appealing. (Source: AnimeNfo)

tags.name: Achromatic
tags.description: Contains animation that is primarily done in black and white.

tags.name: Motorcycles
tags.description: Prominently features the use of motorcycles.

tags.name: Nudity

title: Megumi to Taiyou III: Kajuu Gummi Tweet Fantasy - Timeline World
titleRomaji: Megumi to Taiyou III: Kajuu Gummi Tweet Fantasy - Timeline World
titleNative: メグミとタイヨウIII 果汁グミ Tweet Fantasy タイムラインワールド
synopsis: The third "Megumi to Taiyou" CM for Meiji's Kajuu Gummi candies.

tags.name: Advertisement
tags.description: Produced in order to promote the products of a certain company.

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

title: Tonari no Onigiri-kun
titleNative: となりのおにぎり君
synopsis: Created by one of Studio Ghibli's top animators, Katsuya Kondo, the story is told over three short video clips, produced as part of a promotion for Ito En, Japan's premier manufacturer of bottled tea drinks.

title: Michel
titleNative: 수호요정 미셸
synopsis: A girl named Kim chases a group of thieves called the Black Hammer Gang. Until one day the Black Hammer gang and Kim fall on an island inhabited by fairies and it's guardian Michel. The Black Hammer Gang tries to steal the life source of the island called the tree of life. Causing damage to the land and kidnapping the fairies, Michel and Kim have to combat the Black Hammer gang and take back the fairies. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

title: OZ
titleNative: オズ
synopsis: Loosely based on L.F. Baum's novel, The Wizard of Oz. Original manga done by Itsuki Natsumi. A nuclear war has killed most of humanity and split the USA into six warring states. By 2021, a legend has grown up about the fabled city of OZ where everything still works. Scientist Felicia sets out in search of it with the mercenary Muto and android 1019. At the end of the quest they only discover a military base and a madman. A mercenary was hired by a girl to bring her to the mythical Oz (a paradise) where her missing brother supposedly lived. Accompanying them was a cyborg sent by her brother. But Oz was not the paradise it seemed and her brother was not as sane as he was smart. (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Military

tags.name: Robots

tags.name: Post-Apocalyptic
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a world or civilization after a global disaster.

tags.name: Guns

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

title: Angel's Feather
titleNative: エンジェルズフェザー
synopsis: In the Binfield Kingdom Chronicle, it is said that there was once a small, peaceful country called the Kingdom of Winfield, whose king and royal family possessed great white wings. Hamura Shou is newly enrolled at Yuusei Academy. After hearing about a student named Misonou Kai from the headmaster, Shou comes to believe that Kai is his younger twin brother, who he was separated from when he was younger. However, after a mysterious earthquake, Shou is suddenly carried into another world with two other students. It is in this new world that, after being attacked by a monster, Shou suddenly unleashes great, white wings. [Written by MAL Rewrite]

tags.name: Boys' Love
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two males, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Twins

title: Shimajirou to Ookinaki
titleNative: しまじろうと おおきなき

tags.name: Kids

title: Dekobou Shingachou: Meian no Shippai
titleNative: 凸坊新畫帖 名案の失敗
synonyms: Bumpy new picture book – Failure of a great plan
synopsis: A man first realizes he's born to be a samurai, but is it possible for him to make in the world with only a newly gained dull sword?

title: Kinken Chochiku Shiobara Tasuke
titleNative: 勤倹貯蓄 塩原多助
synopsis: Industrious farmer Tasuke makes the necessary sacrifices to advance his station in life from a farmer to a store-owner. Based on a well-known kabuki tale Shiobara Tasuke ichitai-ki (The Life Story of Shiobara Tasuke), this parable about the virtues of hard work is based on a true story.

title: Project HAL
titleNative: Project HAL
synopsis: Students in the Tokyo, Osaka and Nagoya branches of HAL College of Technology and Design under supervision and sponsorship by professional mecha designer Takayuki Yanase along with other industry professionals, created a series of 3 web movies to act as commercials. The three teams—each consisting of 16 members including animators, artists and effect technicians—are working on their own advertisements to display the talent of the students and the subjects one can learn through attending HAL such as game design, anime development and even car design. Each team is drawing from the same design and story to create their own unique commercials. Initially all 3 branches released a 16-sec. CM before each completing the full 39-sec. Web Movie. Music for each creation is provided by J-rock band MY FIRST STORY. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Tales of Demon and God
titleNative: 妖神记
synopsis: In his past life, although too weak to protect his home when it counted, out of grave determination Nie Li became the strongest Demon Spiritist and stood at the pinnacle of the martial world. However, he lost his life during the battle with the Sage Emperor and six deity-ranked beasts. His soul was then brought back to when he was still 13 years old. Although he's the weakest in his class with the lowest talent, having only a red soul realm and a weak one at that, with the aid of the vast knowledge which he accumulated from his previous life, he decided to train faster than anyone could expect. He also decided to help those who died nobly in his previous life to train faster as well. He aims to protect the city from the coming future of being devastated by demon beasts and the previous fate of ending up destroyed. He aims to protect his lover, friends, family and fellow citizens who died in the beast assault or its aftermath. And he aims to destroy the so-called Sacred family who arrog
